_comment: Golden regression baseline for the TreeMaker optimizer port. Consumed by src/wasm/engine.test.ts. With a correctly-sized Wasm stack (5 MB), the -O2 Wasm ALM build reproduces the original 2005 values to ~6 digits and is fully deterministic. Regenerate the native reference with `npm run oracle`.

cases.desc: centipede with symmetry constraints, infeasible start
optimized centipede, some nodes unpinned (edge strain max)
scorpion, many path-active + edge-strain constraints, infeasible start
